Give a brief history of the internet (1985-present)
The internet began in 1969 as a project sponsored by the U.S. Department of Defense to connect computers over long distances. In 1985, the first 'public' internet service provider, Compuserve, was established. By 1995, the World Wide Web was born and the internet became accessible to the general public. The 2000s saw the rise of social media platforms, mobile devices, and high-speed internet access. In 2015, the internet surpassed 4 billion users, and the development of 5G networks is expected to further revolutionize the way we connect and interact online.
